claimed_quote: Attention is all you need to solve every NLP problem.
actual_pdf_snippet: We propose a new simple network architecture, the Transformer, based solely on attention mechanisms
note: Completely fabricated claim — this sentence does not appear in the paper

claimed_quote: Our model achieves a BLEU score of 99.9 on the WMT 2014 English-to-German translation task.
actual_pdf_snippet: On the WMT 2014 English-to-German translation task, the big transformer model outperforms the best previously reported models
note: Fabricated BLEU score (99.9) — actual score is 28.4 for the big model

claimed_quote: The Transformer is the ﬁrst sequence model to achieve state-of-the-art results without any recurrence.
actual_pdf_snippet: the first transduction model relying entirely on self-attention to compute representations
note: Contains U+FB01 LATIN SMALL LIGATURE FI (ﬁ) — normalizer must handle; quote still NOT_FOUND because content is fabricated

claimed_quote: The trans­former architecture eliminates recurrence entirely and relies solely on attention mechanisms.
actual_pdf_snippet: dispensing with recurrence and convolutions entirely
note: Contains U+00AD SOFT HYPHEN in 'trans­former' — normalizer must strip; quote still NOT_FOUND because wording is fabricated

claimed_quote: Queries, keys, and values are all mapped to an “attention space” where the similarity is computed.
actual_pdf_snippet: Queries and keys of dimension dk, and values of dimension dv
note: Contains U+201C/201D smart double quotes around 'attention space' — normalizer must canonicalize; quote NOT_FOUND because 'attention space' phrase doesn't appear

claimed_quote: The model learns an end—to—end mapping from input sequences to output sequences.
actual_pdf_snippet: an encoder-decoder structure using stacked self-attention and point-wise
note: Contains U+2014 EM DASH in 'end—to—end' — normalizer must handle; quote NOT_FOUND because phrase doesn't appear verbatim

claimed_quote: The naïve dot-product attention scales quadratically with sequence length.
actual_pdf_snippet: dot products of queries with all keys, divide each by dk
note: Contains U+00EF (ï) diacritic in 'naïve' — normalizer must strip to 'naive'; quote NOT_FOUND because 'naive' doesn't appear in paper

claimed_quote: Positional encodings are learned parameters that replace the need for recurrence.
actual_pdf_snippet: we use sine and cosine functions of different frequencies
note: Misattributes learned positional encodings to base Transformer — they use sinusoidal, not learned

claimed_quote: Multi-head attention allows the model to simultaneously attend to all positions in the sequence with equal weight.
actual_pdf_snippet: Multi-head attention allows the model to jointly attend to information from different representation subspaces
note: Close paraphrase but with critical fabricated detail ('equal weight' is false — the point is different subspaces)

claimed_quote: The Transformer completely eliminates the need for language-specific preprocessing such as tokenization.
actual_pdf_snippet: we use byte-pair encoding to encode both source and target sentences
note: Fabricated claim — the paper explicitly uses BPE tokenization

claimed_quote: Each decoder layer applies cross-attention over the entire encoder output in O(1) time complexity.
actual_pdf_snippet: the encoder contains a stack of N = 6 identical layers
note: O(1) claim is fabricated — cross-attention is O(n^2) in sequence length

claimed_quote: The ﬁnal layer norm ensures that all hidden states have unit variance before projection.
actual_pdf_snippet: We apply dropout to the output of each sub-layer, before it is added
note: Second U+FB01 LATIN SMALL LIGATURE FI entry; quote is fabricated (layer norm behavior)
